use_cases: Interactive call-to-action button with animated text reveal on hover
Navigation menu items with distinctive hover state transitions
Pricing page CTA buttons with character-by-character animation effects
Hero section buttons with engaging micro-interactions
Form submission buttons with visual feedback on hover
ai_summary: A stylized hover button component that splits text into individual slats, each animating in alternating directions on hover to reveal different text. Features a sky-blue and dark zinc color scheme with smooth 300-700ms transitions. The staggered character animation creates a distinctive mechanical reveal effect suitable for modern SaaS and fintech interfaces.
